/TWS/CH2:ISS:PROB  5 Y:PJ 120D/CTS:1/SWAPD: 04-18-22/PF525 22/MOP1/LREG/LVAL/LCHEM/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/CTORD: COLLECTION OF COURT OPERATIONS ASSESSMENT AND IMMEDIATE CRITICAL NEEDS ASSESSMENT IS SUSPENDED, COLLECTIONS UNIT NOTIFIED/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 101 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/4019HALF/EMTERM/CTORD: SCRAM TERMINATED/

/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/X: DA MOTION TO REDUCE COUNT 2 TO A MISDEMEANORPER PC 17B:/MO GRTD/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 2/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/X: DEFENSE MOTION TO CONTINUE:/MO GRTD/CONTD: DISCOVERY STATUS/DAWF/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/TE: 1 HOUR/LDPX: 04-15-22 (60)/

/CAL: STATUS OF ELECTRONIC MONITORING/X: DEFENDANT APPEARS IN COURT TODAYWITH THE SCRAM DEVICE/CTORD: DEFENDANT ALLOWED TO VISIT MOTHER AT SEASIDEHOSPITAL FOR 2  HOURS A DAY, TWICE A WEEK WITH TRANSPORTATION ARRANGEMENTS//CTORD: DEFENDANT NOT TO DRIVE/CTORD: DEFENDANT NOT TO DRINK ALCOHOL/X: FUTURE COURT DATE FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 03-21-22 IS CONFIRMED/DOP/LDPX: 04-15-22(60)/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW60/LDPX:04-15-22/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BEPLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH SCRAM DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE ASSET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/LVAL/NALC/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:02-22-22 FOR STATUS OF E,M,/CONTD:03-21-22 FOR PRELIM HEARING/X:EST 1,5 HRS/DOP/
/CAL: DISCOVERY STATUS/DAWT/X: FUTURE COURT DATE OF 04-11-22 FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING IS CONFIRMED/DOP/LDPX: 04-15-22(60)/
